description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. Lovers of elegant minimalism, wear this understated piece with tonal outfits and add one vibrant piece to complete your ensemble. Made of leatherette with a metallic brand badge on the front and a two-tone upper A diagonal zippered pockets on the front and back for style Two leather shoulder handles One main roomy compartment with a zippered pocket and a two pouches inside One zippered pocket at the back Cross over styling at the side of the bag Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
